description: Minimal capabilities for the Eventra Mobile shell. External-link opening uses the opener plugin restricted to standard web schemes (default-urls) — Mobile only opens allow-listed HTTPS pages (terms/privacy/support/web/business-client) and NEVER launches internal-tool apps. It registers/receives only its own eventra-mobile:// scheme in Rust; the web layer exposes no launcher or deep-link IPC and has no shell/exec permission.
